title: Prompt: Situation
description: Generates an inciting situation to launch a story into motion.
entries: receives a letter dated twenty years from now
wakes to find the whole town gone silent
discovers a second door where a wall used to be
is mistaken for someone the entire village has been waiting for
finds their own name carved into a very old tree
inherits a house that comes with a list of rules and no explanation
answers a phone that has not been connected in years
watches a stranger walk out of the sea wearing their coat
is handed a suitcase and told to run before they can ask why
returns home to find every clock set to a different time
learns the funeral they are attending is their own
opens a shop that was locked from the inside for a decade
catches their reflection doing something they did not do
is offered one honest answer to any question, just once
finds a child on the doorstep who calls them by an old name
discovers the map leads to a place that should not be reachable on foot
receives a bill for a debt they have no memory of owing
hears their favorite song sung in a language they never learned
is told they have been chosen, and given no way to refuse
wakes with the memory of a promise but not who it was made to
finds a photograph of themselves somewhere they have never been
is followed home by an animal that clearly knows the way
reads their own obituary in tomorrow's paper
is asked to identify a body wearing their clothes
finds every mirror in the house has been turned to face the wall
receives a package addressed in their mother's handwriting, years too late
wakes to find the road that led into town has simply vanished
is given a key and told only that they will know the lock when they see it
overhears two strangers planning their week in perfect detail
discovers a diary that describes today before today has happened
is handed a baby by a woman who then steps onto a departing train
finds the front door already open and the kettle still warm
learns the storm everyone fears is one they alone can hear
is told the town will hold a festival in their honor tomorrow, and no one will say for what
finds a stranger asleep in their bed who wakes and calls them home
receives instructions to meet themselves at noon
discovers the well in the yard has started answering back
is offered their old life back, at a price they cannot yet read
watches the last train leave and realizes they were meant to be on it
finds that every door in the building now opens onto the same room
